special_attack_id.description: Optional rarer/harder-hitting attack usable at most once per combat encounter.

world_boss.description: When true this mob is a world boss: its spawn/respawn and death are announced to every online player, and its loot resolution guarantees at least one rare-or-higher item drop (drawn from this loot table) on top of the normal rolls. Omit or set false for ordinary mobs, which produce no server-wide announcements. A world boss should include at least one rare-or-higher item in its loot table to back the guaranteed drop.

night_respawn_ticks.description: Optional respawn delay (in ticks) used instead of 'respawn_ticks' while the world clock is at night. Omit for no change at night.

wanders.description: When true the mob may randomly wander between linked rooms each tick. NPCs (tag 'npc') never wander.

summon_duration_ticks.description: Marks this template as a summonable pet: its lifetime (in ticks) once summoned. Pet templates are never spawned into the world at start-up and never respawn — an instance exists only while a player's SUMMON is active. Omit for ordinary world mobs.

charmable.description: When true the mob may be permanently captured as a companion via the TAME command. Omit or set false for mobs that cannot be tamed.

dialogue_id.description: Optional id of a dialogue tree (data/dialogues/) this NPC offers via the TALK command. Omit for mobs with no conversation.

faction_id.description: Optional id of a faction (data/factions/) this mob belongs to. Slaying the mob shifts the killer's reputation with the faction, and the faction's hostility rules govern whether it engages a given player. Omit for faction-neutral mobs.

parry_chance.description: Percentage chance (0-100) that this mob parries an otherwise-landing player MELEE attack: it fully negates that swing's damage and ripostes the attacker with its own attack (attack_id). Only author a non-zero value on defensively trained melee mobs (guards, elite humanoid combatants, boss-tier fighters). The effective chance is clamped to combat's parry bound (MAX_PARRY_CHANCE) at resolution time. Ranged (SHOOT), AoE-spell, and summoned-pet damage never roll this. Omit or set 0 for ordinary mobs, which never parry.

resistances.description: Optional per-DamageType damage reduction (percent 0-100) applied to an incoming typed ability hit, e.g. {"cold": 50} on an ice mob halves an incoming cold spell. Keys match DamageType names case-insensitively (fire/cold/poison). PHYSICAL/untyped damage is never reduced. The effective reduction is clamped to combat's max_resistance_percent at resolution time so a resisted hit is never fully negated. Omit for a mob that resists nothing (today's behaviour).

vulnerabilities.description: Optional per-DamageType damage amplification (percent 0-200) an incoming typed ability hit deals to this mob, e.g. {"fire": 50} on an ice mob makes an incoming fire spell deal 50% more. Keys match DamageType names case-insensitively. PHYSICAL/untyped damage is never amplified. Omit for a mob with no elemental weakness. Author resistances and vulnerabilities as a believable pair (an ice mob resists cold and is weak to fire), never as a strict upgrade.

healer.description: Optional flag (default false) marking a support-caster HEALER mob. When true, on its own AI decision the mob heals the most-wounded different, alive, non-pet mob in its room (at or below heal_threshold percent of that ally's max HP, and not already full) instead of attacking, restoring a random heal_min..heal_max HP clamped to the ally's max, and announcing it to the room. When no ally needs healing it attacks normally via attack_id. Requires heal_min/heal_max when true. Omit for ordinary mobs, which never heal.

heal_min.description: Minimum HP a healer mob restores to an ally per heal. Required (and must be positive) when healer is true; ignored otherwise.

heal_max.description: Maximum HP a healer mob restores to an ally per heal; must be >= heal_min. Required when healer is true; ignored otherwise.

heal_threshold.description: Wounded HP threshold, as a percent (1-100) of an ally's max HP, at or below which a healer mob will heal it. Defaults to 50 when omitted. Ignored unless healer is true.
